name: Valid Characters for Retail Express Fields
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can ensure data integrity and prevent system errors through understanding valid character requirements for "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " fields, particularly for product codes, customer information, and other critical data entry areas. This data quality awareness helps retail operators avoid data import issues and barcode scanning problems, with proper character usage typically reducing system errors and improving operational reliability across Australian retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Valid character guidelines in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " help retail operators maintain clean data that supports reliable barcode scanning, seamless integrations, and accurate data processing throughout retail operations. Understanding character restrictions helps ensure your retail operations establish data standards supporting system stability and preventing common data-related issues."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express only allows certain characters and symbols in various fields within the system. If you try to use a character other than these, you may encounter an error. Typically, non-valid characters are referred to as \"illegal characters\"."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Want to know how many characters you can have in each field? View the "}, {"text": "Field Character Limits"}, {"text": " article to find out."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Valid Characters"}], "data-id": "valid-characters"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To see details for specific fields, please refer to the table below."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Supplier SKU*"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text":
